claims.claim: Governance must be lifecycle-spanning and cross-cutting, not a one-time checklist.
claims.source: NIST AI RMF core Govern/Map/Measure/Manage framing via web.run search result turn876895search0

claims.claim: Guardrails can miss execution pathways such as handoffs unless explicitly scoped to those pathways.
claims.source: OpenAI Agents SDK guardrails via web.run search result turn876895search1

claims.claim: Tracing should capture tool calls, handoffs, guardrails, and custom events for auditing and debugging.
claims.source: OpenAI agent governance/tracing sources via web.run search results turn876895search7 and turn876895search13

claims.claim: Agentic systems must address risks across planning, tools, memory, orchestration, and no-governance/update-drift conditions.
claims.source: OWASP Agentic AI resources via web.run search results turn876895search2, turn876895search5, turn876895search8
